overview.intro_desc: PS Aunics VINA is a subsidiary of PS Aunics (Penta Stone Group, Korea), located at Gia Van Industrial Complex, Ninh Binh Province, Vietnam. Specializing in MEMS Microphone back-end packaging for Samsung Electronics and comprehensive OEM/ODM electronics manufacturing. With 550+ employees, 16 SMT lines and a 41,000㎡ facility, we are the trusted manufacturing partner of Samsung, Naver and leading global brands.
overview.mems_p: MEMS Microphone back-end production (Wafer Laser Dicing, Die Attach, Wire Bonding) for Samsung Electronics.
overview.oem_p: Contract manufacturing for Naver AI Speakers (Clova), smart watches, LTE/5G modules and consumer electronics.
overview.auto_p: PCBA, dashcam and automotive electronics manufacturing to IATF 16949 standards.
overview.lte_p: LTE/5G communication module production for SKT, KT, LG U+ and global customers.
overview.group_desc: PS Aunics VINA is a member of Penta Stone Group — a Korean electronics group specializing in RF power amplifiers. Leveraging group technology and global networks, PS Aunics VINA maintains world-class competitiveness in mobile, automotive and industrial electronics.

about.title:
World-Class Manufacturing
Expertise in Vietnam
about.desc: PS Aunics VINA is a subsidiary of PS Aunics (Penta Stone Group), specializing in MEMS Microphone packaging and OEM/ODM electronics manufacturing at Gia Van Industrial Complex, Ninh Binh. We are the trusted manufacturing partner of Samsung, Naver, and leading global brands.

business.desc: Specialized manufacturing solutions for global partners

products_section.ecm_desc: ECM microphone manufacturing with 20+ years of expertise for automotive and consumer applications
products_section.ems_desc: Full-service contract electronics manufacturing from components to finished products for global Tier-1 partners

global.title: Global Network
global.desc: 4 manufacturing locations across 3 countries — serving customers worldwide

history.subtitle: From our founding in 2002 to the present — the journey of challenge and growth at PS Aunics

global_page.subtitle: We have built a global manufacturing network spanning from our Korean headquarters to Vietnam and China.

cert.title: Certifications
cert.subtitle: PS Aunics holds multiple international certifications that meet global quality standards.
cert.iso9001_desc: Quality Management System — international standard ensuring product quality and customer satisfaction
cert.iso14001_desc: Environmental Management System — international standard for systematic environmental performance management
cert.iatf_desc: Automotive Quality Management System — fulfilling automotive industry-specific quality requirements
cert.iso45001_desc: Occupational Health and Safety Management System — international standard protecting employee safety and health

expertise.title: Production Expertise
expertise.desc: PS Aunics VINA possesses world-class manufacturing expertise across all areas of purchasing, process, SMT, and quality.
expertise.purchase_item1: Global Component Sourcing — Sourcing components from global leaders such as Samsung, TDK, and Murata
expertise.purchase_item2: Supply Chain Optimization — Operating JIT delivery and inventory minimization systems
expertise.purchase_item3: Supplier Management — Rigorous supplier qualification and quality evaluation process
expertise.purchase_item4: Cost Competitiveness — Securing cost advantage through strategic sourcing
expertise.process_item1: MEMS Packaging — Full process: Wafer Laser Dicing, Die Attach, Wire Bonding
expertise.process_item2: Automotive Manufacturing — Automotive electronics production to IATF 16949 standards
expertise.process_item3: Precision Assembly — High-precision assembly and inspection of miniature electronic components
expertise.smt_item1: 16 SMT Lines — Latest Fuji and Panasonic mounters in operation
expertise.smt_item3: AOI/SPI Inspection — 100% automated optical inspection applied
expertise.quality_item1: ISO 9001 — International quality management system certification
expertise.quality_item2: IATF 16949 — Automotive quality management system certification
expertise.quality_item3: 6 Sigma — Data-driven pursuit of zero defects
expertise.quality_item4: Real-time SPC — Statistical process control for quality stability

facilities.title: Manufacturing Facilities
facilities.desc: PS Aunics operates state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities across 3 countries: Korea, Vietnam, and China.

mems_mic.intro: PS Aunics VINA is the exclusive supply partner for Samsung Electronics, producing high-performance MEMS microphones integrated into smartphones, tablets, and wearables.
mems_mic.analog_top_desc: Compact analog microphone delivering industry-leading SNR and sensitivity
mems_mic.analog_bottom_desc: Bottom Port analog MEMS microphone with low self-noise characteristics
mems_mic.digital_desc: Digital output MEMS microphone supporting I²S/PDM interface
mems_mic.roic_desc: Through in-house ASIC design capabilities, we develop customized ROICs and achieve optimal SNR and power efficiency.
mems_mic.pkg_desc: Ultra-compact package design supports various form factors while maximizing acoustic performance and water/dust resistance.
mems_mic.acoustic_desc: FEA-based acoustic simulation and anechoic chamber measurement systems enable precise acoustic characteristic analysis and optimization.
mems_mic.experience_desc: Accumulated mass production know-how since our founding in 2002 ensures high yield and stable quality.

ecm_mic.intro: PS Aunics has over 20 years of ECM microphone manufacturing expertise. We supply optimized ECM solutions for diverse applications from automotive to consumer electronics.
ecm_mic.size4_desc: Ultra-compact high-performance ECM — for wearables and earbuds
ecm_mic.size6_desc: Standard general-purpose ECM — for home appliances and communications
ecm_mic.size97_desc: Large-diameter high-sensitivity ECM — for automotive and broadcasting
ecm_mic.feature4_desc: Characteristic optimization service per customer specifications

mems_sensor.intro: PS Aunics develops and manufactures core sensors in the environmental monitoring field. We provide high-precision MEMS sensor solutions optimized for IoT, smart home, and industrial applications.
mems_sensor.h2_desc: High-precision MEMS-based combined humidity and temperature sensor
mems_sensor.co2_desc: High-precision CO₂ concentration measurement using NDIR method
mems_sensor.ir_desc: Non-contact temperature measurement and thermal imaging detection
mems_sensor.multi_desc: Integrated measurement solution for temperature, humidity, CO₂, and dust

automotive.intro: PS Aunics VINA manufactures automotive electronics based on IATF 16949 certification. We supply advanced automotive electronics solutions including dashcams, DMS, IMS, and automotive camera modules.
automotive.dashcam_desc: Dual-channel front/rear dashcam — manufactured to IATF 16949 certification
automotive.dms_desc: Driver Monitoring System — real-time drowsiness and distraction detection
automotive.ims_desc: Interior Monitoring System — vehicle interior state detection
automotive.camera_desc: Automotive Camera Module — rear camera, around-view, ADAS camera

lte5g.intro: PS Aunics collaborates with major domestic and international telecom operators to manufacture LTE/5G communication modules and routers. We supply proven telecom solutions certified by SKT, KT, and LG U+.
lte5g.dongle_desc: USB-type LTE/5G dongle — for laptops and industrial devices
lte5g.mmwave_desc: 5G millimeter wave module — supporting ultra-high-speed communications
lte5g.modem_desc: Fixed industrial LTE modem — IoT and M2M solutions
lte5g.case1_desc: Mass production supply of 5G wireless router exclusively for SK Telecom
lte5g.case2_desc: Manufacturing LTE router dedicated to KT Home IoT
lte5g.case3_desc: Supply of mobile Wi-Fi router exclusively for LG U+
lte5g.case4_desc: LTE gateway for smart factories and transportation infrastructure
lte5g.partner_desc: Working together with Korea's major 3 telecom operators and global telecom partners.

oem_odm.intro: PS Aunics VINA performs contract manufacturing (EMS) for diverse consumer electronics including AI speakers, wearables, wallpads, and battery packs. We provide One-Stop service from component sourcing to finished products.
oem_odm.ai_speaker_desc: AI smart speaker with Naver Clova — acoustically optimized assembly
oem_odm.tws_desc: True Wireless Earbuds — precision assembly and acoustic inspection
oem_odm.wallpad_desc: Smart home wallpad — touch panel, door phone integration
oem_odm.battery_desc: Lithium-ion battery pack — safe assembly with integrated BMS
oem_odm.ev_recorder_desc: Electric vehicle dashcam — integrated ADAS features
oem_odm.mic_module_desc: Multi-channel microphone array module — beamforming support
oem_odm.wireless_charger_desc: Qi wireless charging pad — high-efficiency design
oem_odm.toll_desc: Electronic toll collection device — road authority certified product
oem_odm.cap2_desc: Operating professional soldering staff to IPC-A-610 standards
oem_odm.cap3_desc: Integrated ICT, FCT, and burn-in testing
oem_odm.cap4_desc: Full box assembly, labeling, and pallet packaging

portal.title: Internal System Portal
portal.desc: This system is for PS Aunics VN employees only. Please log in with an authorized account.
portal.hris_desc: Integrated management of employee information, attendance records, and payroll.
portal.dispatch_desc: Integrated management of employee shuttle and business vehicle dispatch, driver assignment, and Zalo notifications.
portal.calib_desc: Systematic management of measuring equipment calibration history, periodic notifications, and certificate issuance.
portal.4m_desc: Manage change history for Man, Machine, Material, and Method in accordance with IATF 16949.
portal.thermo_desc: Real-time monitoring of temperature and humidity conditions in the factory.
portal.layout_desc: View temperature and humidity sensor placement and measurements by factory zone.
portal.alarm_desc: Generates alarms when temperature or humidity exceeds thresholds for immediate abnormal environment detection.
portal.coil_desc: Real-time monitoring of equipment status on the wireless charging coil production line.

quality.title: Quality Policy
quality.subtitle: Introducing the Quality Policy of PS Aunics
quality.policy_text: Our quality policy is to establish a quality system that meets international standards, proactively prevent non-conformances, pursue continuous quality improvement, and provide excellent and reliable products and services that delight our customers.
quality.commit_intro: To achieve this policy, all executives and employees of PS Aunics Vietnam Co., Ltd. commit to the following.
quality.commit1: Comply with all requirements of IATF 16949:2016, the quality management system standard.
quality.commit2: Establish, implement, maintain, and manage the quality management system and continuously improve its effectiveness.
quality.commit3: Each year, each department must establish quality objectives and strive with full effort to achieve them.
quality.commit4: Review the continued suitability of this policy.
quality.commit5: This policy must be understood and communicated to all employees, and the responsibilities and authorities defined in the quality management manual must be faithfully implemented.

ethics.title: Ethical Management
ethics.label: Ethical Management
ethics.intro: PS Aunics upholds integrity and transparency as the highest values of corporate management, practicing ethical management to become a company trusted by all stakeholders.
ethics.def_sub: We clearly define the ethical standards that the company and its employees must uphold.
ethics.def_corp_desc: A decision-making standard for relationships with stakeholders, pursuing fair and transparent management beyond mere legal compliance.
ethics.def_emp_desc: The obligation of all employees to comply with company policies, regulations and procedures, and to faithfully uphold the principles of information security, anti-corruption and mutual respect.
ethics.stake_sub: We fulfill our ethical responsibilities to all stakeholders.
ethics.stake_customer_d: We provide the highest quality and safety and thoroughly protect customer information.
ethics.stake_employee_d: We respect individuals and guarantee safety, health, welfare and diversity.
ethics.stake_supplier_d: We comply with fair trade and grow together based on mutual trust.
ethics.stake_shareholder_d: We protect shareholder value through sound performance and transparent governance.
ethics.stake_competitor_d: We comply with fair competition and refrain from unfair practices.
ethics.stake_society_d: We protect the environment and contribute to community development.
ethics.system_sub: We operate a three-stage compliance management system from prevention to response.
ethics.system_prevent_d: We prevent violations in advance through monitoring of regulatory changes, ethics training, self-audits and helpdesk operation.
ethics.system_monitor_d: We continuously monitor compliance through checklist-based periodic reviews and issue tracking during operations.
ethics.system_respond_d: We manage and evaluate violations, share the results, and enforce sanctions and preventive measures.
ethics.charter_sub: Our commitment to practicing ethical management.
ethics.charter_desc: PS Aunics has established an ethics charter and a code of conduct so that all employees use them as the standard for ethical judgment in their daily work, and regularly reviews and improves their adequacy.
ethics.charter_p1: All employees comply with relevant laws and internal regulations.
ethics.charter_p2: We earn stakeholders trust through fair and transparent transactions.
ethics.charter_p3: We reject corruption and irregularities and establish a culture of integrity.
ethics.charter_p4: We educate all employees on ethical management and continuously improve it.
ethics.report_sub: If you discover any corruption, irregularity or unethical conduct, please report it through the channels below.
ethics.report_box_desc: Submitted reports are kept confidential, and results are provided after investigation.
ethics.report_protect_desc: The identity of the whistleblower is strictly protected, and no disadvantage will result from reporting.

ev.title: EV & Wireless Charging Solutions
ev.desc: We provide automotive wireless charging coil modules and EV charger manufacturing services for the electric vehicle era.
ev.wireless_desc: A MagSafe-type coil module supporting 25W fast wireless charging for vehicles.
ev.charger_desc: We provide high-capacity power circuit and charger manufacturing services for EV charging infrastructure.
